reviews.comment:
Los playeros parece que trabajaran a reglamento, les cuesta ponerle ganas. Hoy, 26/06/2025, Día de la Cartografía en Argentina, es la última vez que paso por ahí a intentar cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants seem to be working by the book; they don't seem to put much effort into their work. Today, June 26, 2025, Cartography Day in Argentina, is the last time I'll be going there to try and fill up.

reviews.comment:
Queremos destacar la atención de MILENE, rápida, muy explicativa y sobre todo muy Amable ❤️ por más YPF con empleados asi

(Translated by Google)
We want to highlight Milene's excellent service: quick, very helpful, and above all, very kind ❤️ We need more YPF stores with employees like her!

reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar, le pedí lleno, el playero pone a llenar y se va, que pasa se rebalsa, encima no te dice Uuu perdón se me rebalsó y chorreo, no nada, cuando me voy me doy cuenta que echa tierra y caí que se rebalsó, entonces vuelvo y le digo tanto te cuesta decir que se rebalsó y quedó todo con nafta para al menos pasar un trapo con agua así no se macha la chapa, no ni bola me dieron y encima cuando veo el charco era bastante casi 3 o 4 litros que encima los pagué.

(Translated by Google)
I went to fill up, I asked for a full tank, the attendant started the pump and left, what happened, it overflowed, and on top of that he didn't even say, "Oh, sorry, it overflowed and leaked," nothing, when I left I realized he was throwing dirt and it dawned on me that it overflowed, so I went back and said, "Is it so hard to admit that it overflowed and there was gas everywhere so I could at least wipe it down with a damp cloth so the metal doesn't get stained?" They didn't even care, and on top of that, when I saw the puddle it was quite a lot, almost 3 or 4 liters, which I had already paid for.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VOdjQtN3VoZ19meGNREAE

reviews.comment:
La comida bien, el café excelente pero el nuevo sistema para inflar las ruedas es un bodrio ( casi siempre da error de conexión el QR de mercado pago y la ficha "solo con efectivo").

(Translated by Google)
The food was good, the coffee excellent, but the new system for inflating the tires is a disaster (the Mercado Pago QR code almost always gives a connection error and the "cash only" sign).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNNEptbGFBEAE

reviews.comment:
vine a comer una doble chedar por el día de la hamburguesa, y no solo que tardaron 1hs en prepararme el pedido, sino q también me dieron una simple con la excusa de que era un medallón más grande y que "reemplazaba" a la doble

(Translated by Google)
I came to get a double cheddar burger for National Hamburger Day, and not only did it take an hour to prepare my order, but they also gave me a single burger with the excuse that it was a bigger patty and that it "replaced" the double.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VLMkxwNGlBdmNiM2dBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación es buena. Lo que no se comprende es como tardan tanto para cargar combustible. Sin nadie adelante 15 minutos de espera. Displicentes!

(Translated by Google)
The station is good. What's baffling is the long wait for fuel. With no one ahead of me, I waited 15 minutes. Disdainful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s0MlJsbEZNbkZ5TjBSdlZXZEZjWEkyYURFd2NsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Las hamburguesas frías, las mesas todas sucias y lleno de moscas, los baños sucios y de paso no te preguntan si queres la hamburguesa con aderezos o no, le ponen no más

(Translated by Google)
The burgers were cold, the tables were all dirty and full of flies, the bathrooms were filthy, and to top it off, they don't even ask if you want toppings on your burger, they just slap them on.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VNYjV1cHFteHV6VDhBRRAB
